description: OpenShock Agent OS Roadmap - connect existing agent, handoff, governance, runtime, memory, and release evidence primitives with a scheduling kernel, long-running agent execution, human-agent collaboration surfaces, and auditable delivery policy.

userStories.title: Add orchestrator ticket lifecycle model
userStories.description: As a local operator, I want Board tickets to have a scheduler lifecycle separate from business status so that agents can claim and release work reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an orchestrator lifecycle model with Unclaimed, Claimed, Running, RetryQueued, Released, and terminal mapping
Persist lifecycle fields without removing existing Board issue fields
Add store tests for lifecycle transitions and invalid transition rejection
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add per-ticket workspace manager
userStories.description: As a runtime operator, I want every ticket to run in a safe durable workspace so that retries and continuations preserve work without escaping the workspace root.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a workspace manager that maps ticket ids to sanitized directory names under the configured workspace root
Reject paths outside the workspace root and reject names outside [A-Za-z0-9._-]
Persist workspace path metadata on the ticket scheduler state
Add Go tests for sanitization, reuse, and path escape rejection
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add poll and reconcile loop skeleton
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want the scheduler to reconcile running work before dispatching new work so that stale state does not accumulate.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an orchestrator tick that first reconciles active tickets and then selects eligible tickets
Expose tick configuration with a default polling interval
Record last reconcile time and last dispatch decision in state
Add tests proving terminal tickets are not dispatched again
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add retry backoff and stall detection
userStories.description: As a local operator, I want stalled agent work to retry with bounded backoff so that long-running automation can recover without spinning.
acceptanceCriteria: Track attempt count, nextRetryAt, lastAgentEventAt, and stall reason on scheduler state
Apply bounded exponential backoff for retry scheduling
Move stalled running tickets into RetryQueued with a visible reason
Add tests for normal retry, max backoff, and stall timeout behavior
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose orchestrator snapshot API
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want a snapshot of running, retrying, stalled, and recently reconciled work so that autonomous execution is inspectable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a read-only orchestrator snapshot API endpoint
Snapshot includes running count, retrying count, stalled count, ticket ids, assigned agent, workspace path, and last event time
Signed-out requests are rejected or redacted consistently with existing auth policy
Add API contract tests for authenticated and signed-out snapshot access
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add AgentRunner interface
userStories.description: As an integrator, I want Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini execution behind one interface so that the scheduler can assign work without engine-specific branching.
acceptanceCriteria: Define AgentRunner methods for start_thread, start_turn, stream_events, and stop_thread
Add a fake runner used by tests
Wire scheduler dispatch to the fake runner without invoking real CLI processes
Add tests proving first turn creates a thread and records turn metadata
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add turn continuation lifecycle
userStories.description: As an agent teammate, I want follow-up turns to continue in the same thread so that long tasks do not restart context every time.
acceptanceCriteria: Distinguish first-turn prompt from continuation-turn prompt
Respect a configurable maxTurns limit per ticket
Persist thread id, current turn id, and completed turn count
Add tests for continuation after non-terminal work and stop at maxTurns
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hibernate and wake semantics
userStories.description: As a collaborator, I want idle agents to hibernate and wake on mentions or ticket events so that they behave like teammates without wasting runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Represent agent online states as Online, Thinking, Working, and Hibernating
Idle scheduler state can move an agent to Hibernating without losing thread metadata
@mention or eligible ticket event can wake the agent for a new turn
Add tests for hibernate, wake, and metadata preservation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Unify Room and DM timeline blocks
userStories.description: As a workspace member, I want Rooms and DMs to render human messages, agent messages, system events, and tool calls consistently so that collaboration feels coherent.
acceptanceCriteria: Introduce a shared timeline block model for human, agent, system, and tool-call blocks
Rooms render the shared block model without losing existing message anchors
DMs render the shared block model or a compatible subset
Add web contract tests for timeline block anchors
pnpm test:web-contracts passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show agent presence and handoff ownership
userStories.description: As a collaborator, I want to see which agent owns the next step and whether it is working, thinking, online, or hibernating so that Rooms feel like a team space.
acceptanceCriteria: Room and sidebar surfaces show agent presence from existing agent profile or scheduler state
Handoff ownership appears once in the primary next-step area without duplicating summaries
Presence labels use Online, Thinking, Working, and Hibernating
Add web contract coverage for presence and ownership anchors
pnpm test:web-contracts passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Load WORKFLOW.md runtime policy
userStories.description: As a team lead, I want project policy to be declared in WORKFLOW.md so that polling, concurrency, DoD, hooks, and agent prompt policy can change without rebuilding OpenShock.
acceptanceCriteria: Load WORKFLOW.md from the active workspace repo when present
Parse YAML front matter for polling, concurrency, definitionOfDone, hooks, and agent runtime policy
Expose parsed policy in orchestrator state with validation errors
Add tests for missing file, valid policy, invalid policy, and hot reload after file change
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add workflow hook runner
userStories.description: As an operator, I want workflow hooks around workspace creation and agent turns so that project-specific preparation and verification can be externalized safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Support after_create, before_run, after_run, and before_remove hook definitions from workflow policy
Apply a default hook timeout and record hook exit code, duration, and log path
after_create failure blocks workspace creation and after_run failure records evidence without deleting work
Add tests for successful hook, timeout, and failure handling
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Connect release gate to Definition of Done
userStories.description: As a release reviewer, I want scheduler completion to require release gate evidence so that Agent Done is auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow definitionOfDone can require an existing release gate command
Scheduler moves completed agent work to review until the gate result is recorded
Gate report path is attached to the ticket and Room evidence
Add tests for passing gate, failing gate, and missing evidence path
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Attach proof-of-work headed evidence
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want completed agent work to include a headed replay, screenshot, or comparable artifact so that completion can be inspected without trusting text alone.
acceptanceCriteria: After-run evidence can attach headed replay, screenshot, or report paths to a ticket
Rooms show a single evidence link or card for the latest completed turn
Missing evidence keeps the ticket out of Done when workflow policy requires it
Add web and server tests for evidence attachment and missing evidence handling
pnpm test:web-contracts passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add orchestrator command center view
userStories.description: As a local operator, I want a simple command center view of agents, tickets, runtime readiness, retry state, and evidence so that autonomous work is understandable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a command center surface backed by orchestrator snapshot API
The first screen shows active tickets, assigned agents, runtime readiness, last event time, retry status, and evidence status
The UI uses a simplified hierarchy with one primary action per active ticket
Add web contract tests for command center anchors
pnpm test:web-contracts passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
